title: equisetum hyemale f. minus
intro: Equisetum hyemale f. minus, also known as dwarf scouring rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Equisetum genus, a group of vascular plants commonly referred to as horsetails. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as a diuretic, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale f. minus include its potential to support kidney function, lower blood pressure, and reduce the symptoms of urinary tract infections. Equisetum hyemale f. minus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
